titleStmt.title: SII 34.95: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 95. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east, north and west walls of the Chaṇḍikēśvara shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājēndra III, 12th year, sudi 3, Friday = A.D. 1258.

The record gives the details of the land possessions of a maṭha called Tiruñānasambandaṉ-tirumaḍam received from the temple and maintained by a devotee called Kuṉṟaṉ Kiḻāṉ Tirunāvukkarasudēvaṉ from Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The latter gave some land to the temple in exchange for the above. He also added much to the landed properties of the maṭha by purchase and gift. He appealed to its future caretakers not to misuse the properties by any means, even if ordered so by the temple trustees and the government officials.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sva[ stiśrī tirapuva] ṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājEntira cOḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2
vatu ṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa ḷ vaṭakarai vikkiramacōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu
śrī kā vatimaṅkalattu tirukkāṟkōṭīśvaramuṭaiya nāya
ṉār kōyilil kumpiṭṭirukkum jayaṅkoṇṭa cōḻamaṇṭalattu
Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk kōṭṭattuk kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ tirunāvukkaracu tēvaṉē
n Iṉakku Uṭaiyār tirukāṟkōṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār mātāvum pitāvum
gurukkaḷumāy rakṣittaruḷi Iṉakku prasādam maṭam paṇṇiyaruḷiṉa tiruṉāṉacampantaṉ
tirumaṭamum puḻaikkaṭaiyumāṉa nilam kuḻinūṟu Ikkuḻi nūṟum Iṉakkut tanta
ruḷukaiyil Itukkut talaimāṟāka nāṉ parivaṟttaṉai paṇṇikkuṭutta cōḻa mahā
devi vatikkuk kiḻakkut tiruvārūr vāykkālukkut teṟkut tirucciṟṟampala nallū
r kaṭṭaḷaiyil Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Oṉpatāñ catirattu kōtaṇṭarā
mapperuvāykkāl mēlkarait tuṇṭattu Ināyaṉār tēvatāṉattukku
vaṭakku Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa puṉcait tiruttu nilam kuḻi nānāṟu Ikkuḻi nāṉūṟum ku
ṭuttu Immaṭamum maṭaśeṣamumāṉa kuḻi nūṟum Eṉṉutāṉamaiyil Immaṭattuk
ku śeṣamāka maṟṟum Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilamāyk kuṭutta cōḻa mahādeviva
tikku kiḻakku sarasvati vāykkālukkut teṟku vīra rāma cōḻa nallūr
kaṭṭaḷaiyil mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu kām kam Eṉṟu pēr kū
ṉu tāyirunta svara Oru pūvum vilaik puṉceyt tiruttum puṉ ceykuṭimakka
ḷ kuṭiyiruppumaṉai Irupatu 2 10 Uḷppaṭṭa nilam Eṭṭumāvum tirunārāyaṇavatikkukki
ḻakku sarasvati vāykkālukkut teṟku kulamāṇikka nallūr kaṭṭaḷaiyil Ai
ñcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcatirattu teṟkaṭainta nilam nālumāvil mēṟ
kaṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭu mā nīkki Itaṉ kiḻakku nilam Iraṇṭumāvil mēṟ
kaṭaiyap puḷḷamaṅkalattu Etirilicōḻa nampi Immaṭattukku śeṣamā
ka nīrvāttut tanta kamukan tōṭṭam nilam kāṇiyaraikkāṇikkīḻ mukkā
lēyirumāvaraiyum Āka Ikkamukan tōṭṭa nilamu Ivviḷai nilamu pu
ṉ ceyttiruttu nilamum puṉceyum I
m maṭattukku śeṣamākavum Immaṭamum Immaṭaśeṣamāka nāṉ kuṭutta ni
laṅkaḷum Eṉ kāṇiyākaiyāl I
tiluḷḷār Immaṭamum Aṉupavittu
(pavittu) Idharmmam rakṣikkak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭi
bhrātā Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār Eṉai Immaṭatti�
sittu Irukka pratiṣṭhittamaiyil Iṅkuttaikku nāḷoṉṟu
tākki Amutu ceyvittu tiruppaḷḷiyaṟaiyum nōkkittiruviḷa
luḷḷār coṉṉār O r Irukkavum Immaṭamum Innilamu
maṉaikaḷum kōyi taikaḷuṇṭāy tāyākilum U
ttuṭaṉ kūṭṭuṭai Ikkōyil tāṉattār kōyiṟṟamar coṉṉārkaḷeṉṟu kūṭṭa
ḷḷutal ceyyak kaṭavarkaḷallātārākavum Eṉ vaṅśattiluḷḷārum Idharma mu
nōkki Innilaṅkaḷumaṉupavittu varumatoḻiya Immaṭamum nilaṅkaḷum viṟṟal ṉu
vattal kuṭuttal ceyyakkaṭavarka ḷalātārākavum Ippaṭikaḷ Oḻiyac ceytāruṇṭā
kil śivadrohikikaḷ gurudrohikaḷ Īśvarararāṇai maṟuttār cokkanāyaka r Ā
ṇai maṟuttār munūṟṟaimpattaṟuvar Āṇai maṟuttārpaṭum teṇṭappa ṭakkaṭavar
kaḷākavum Ippaṭi niccayittuk kal veṭṭiṉēṉ kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ tirunāvukkaracu
tēvaṉēṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai tirunāvukkaracu tēvaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi sammadittu I
dharmmam rakṣikkak kaṭavEṉāṉamaikku Ivai kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampala muṭai
yār makaṉ kūttaperumāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyār makaṉ ñāṉatēcaṉ Eḻuttu
śrīmāheśvarar tanmam ..
Digital edition of SII 34.95 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
